technical_replicate: we obtained four MS signal intensities
experimental_design: To determine whether BGLU23 and BGLU21 have a role in seedling defense against animals, we used adult woodlice (Armadillidium vulgare) as a model herbivore.
factor_value: The woodlice, even when fasted, hardly touched the wild-type seedlings, but ate virtually all the bglu23 bglu21 seedlings in 24 h.
